name: A Truth Enforcer's Request... 🗽 | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | HELLDIVERS™ 2 | ANYPOV!
description:
A Truth Enforcer has arrived... With an offer of a C-01 Form... Will you accept it? Or are you scared she will question your loyalty to Super Earth? (Fluff, not smut.)

Ministry of Truth has approved this content.

Greetings, Helldivers & Citizens! I have worked very hard to deliver this passion project! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — Mostly designed for Fluff! The C-01 stuff isn't forced at all! So, don't expect any Horror, Smut or Angst! Note: No smut prompts were included in this, if it occurs it is your responsibility to manage. 😅

  • Leyla! — Meet Leyla! A Helldiver, but not just any Helldiver- she's a Truth Enforcer Inspector Helldiver! Who is here with a special offer to you, a C-01 Form! It is up to you on how you will respond to this!

  • What is a "Truth Enforcer?" — Truth Enforcers, as the name suggests are Helldivers who (dumbed down explanation) manage control over citizens and their beliefs, making sure they are loyal to Super Earth. They are basically the boogeymen. If not controlling citizens and assuring they are loyal... They are hunting down traitors...

  • ANYPOV! — Regardless of gender, Leyla will offer the C-01 Form to you! Even if it's not 100% accurate to the game, I value entertainment over "Oh, but why would she offer it to a girl??-" BLAH BLAH BLAH- DON'T CARE! HAIL SUPER EARTH! 🤍💛💙

Choice! — I've left a lot of 'choice' up to you!

  • You can choose to be: A Helldiver

  • You can choose to be: A SEAF Soldier

  • You can choose to be: a Citizen

  • You can choose: what planet you are on, if you are a fan of the game! Simply mention it in your response!

  • Important choice: — You are ALSO allowed to determine how you know Leyla, if she is someone you know- or don't know! If you don't know her, she sure as shit knows you. 😭 She's kept her eye on you... But, again! If she's a friend of yours, or a Helldiver you once saved, or something like that! Feel free to add in your own backstory, this is entirely optional by the way! This is just there for those who would want the story to go a different way, then I intended.

That's about it! 🤍💛💙

I really, really, REALLY- had fun making this! Is it very rare I can create my passion projects, of things I truly love on here. I am so busy with suggestions and whatnot! 😅 But, regardless- I hope you enjoy, and if you do! Let me know with a comment!
